limitations: Trace refinement tests selected transitions; it is not a mechanized implementation refinement proof.
The end-to-end composed model is complete only over its 36 declared finite actions; other models remain selected-trace mappings.
Declared-action coverage does not prove every runtime parameter, concurrency schedule, deployment, or external-system behavior.
The formal models, adapters, and runtime implementations are maintained by the same team.
Cryptographic primitives, trusted clocks, provider truth, complete mediation, and durable database semantics remain explicit acceptance roots.
